title: Tasks 2 and 3
text:
Preamble
This is a temporary placeholder until I have access to the vectors from Task 1

patient <- c("Subject_1", "Subject_2")
pre_bp <- c(119, 132)
post_bp <- c(132, 199)
diff_bp <- pre_bp - post_bp



Task 2: Basic Data Frame Practice
This is continued from the previous example, wherein four vectors were used: patient, pre_bp, post_bp, and diff_bp.

First we create a data frame object with the four columns corresponding to the previously mentioned vectors:


bd_df <- data.frame(patient, pre_bp, post_bp, diff_bp)
bd_df

    patient pre_bp post_bp diff_bp
1 Subject_1    119     132     -13
2 Subject_2    132     199     -67



Now we return just the rows where diff_bp is negative (indicating a decrease in blood pressure).
